message:
fix: audit-driven correctness fixes across 27+ modules

- service/timeout.rs: Sleep::with_time_getter skips waker registration (HIGH)
  Same pattern as rate_limit.rs — use Sleep::new(deadline) instead
- obligation/saga.rs: coordination-free batch missing is_conflict() check (MEDIUM)
  Added conflict detection after lattice join + regression test
- distributed/distribution.rs: 6 metric counters using += instead of saturating_add (HIGH)
- obligation/no_aliasing_proof.rs: kind/region mismatch now fails DropSafety step + tests
- sync/once_cell.rs: docstring and control flow cleanup to match blocking+retry behavior
- h2/error.rs: explicit 0x2 arm restored (linter style preference)
- h3_native.rs: trailer/QPACK fixes from prior audit
- Various other audit-driven fixes across sync, transport, cx, combinator modules

All 25 files pass clippy --all-targets -D warnings clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
